description_long: This is a classical-style bust sculpture depicting the head and upper shoulders of a person with finely detailed facial features and hair. The subject has a serious expression, with short, wavy hair swept to the side and a braid or twist at the back. The bust is mounted on a round, tiered pedestal that appears to be made of a darker stone or marble, contrasting with the lighter color of the figure itself. The surface of the sculpture is smooth with subtle textural details in the hair and clothing folds. The back of the head shows a pronounced braid and some surface discoloration or weathering. The overall form is realistic and proportionate, suggesting a representation of a historical or notable individual.
description: A realistic bust sculpture of a person with detailed facial features and hair, mounted on a round, tiered pedestal. The figure is rendered in a light stone with a darker stone base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the detailed face, wavy hair, and the full shape of the bust and pedestal.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile, ear, and the braid or twist at the back of the head.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, the pronounced braid, and the full pedestal.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile, facial features, and the way the hair is styled and gathered at the back.
attribute_location_context: No specific setting or environment is visible; the sculpture appears isolated against a plain background.
